message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Shared memory receiver behaviour

participant "Shared memory receiver" as SMR
box "Coordination struct"
participant "Reader count var" as RCV
participant "locks_active" as LA
participant "locks_leaving" as LL
participant "Semaphore copy" as SC
participant "Copy buff" as CB
end box

group create
  alt ["Coordination semaphore doesn't exist"]
    SMR -> SMR: Create semaphore
    SMR -> SC: Semaphore coord
  end
  SMR -> SMR: wait
  SMR <-- RCV: Writer sets up sharedmemory\nWriter is ready
  CB -> CB: Writer inits it with the required number
  SMR -> SMR: ok
  SMR -> RCV: reincrease
  note over RCV: this way all readers access the memory,\nthey will fail on the copy sem
  SMR -> CB: MMap coordination struct
  SMR <-- CB
  SMR -> SC: Trylock copy semaphore
  alt [fail]
    SMR -> SMR: Can't lock
    SMR <-- SMR: Fail
  end
  alt [success]
    SMR -> SMR: Success
    SMR -> CB: MMap copy buffer
    SMR <-- CB
    SMR -> RCV: read_flag to true
    SMR -> LL: Lock leaving[1]
    LL --> SMR
    SMR -> LA: Signal reader ready
    SMR -> SC: Close coordination semaphore file
    SMR <-- SC
    SMR <-- SMR: Success
  end
end

group ready
  SMR -> SMR: ready?
  alt [finished flag set]
    SMR -> SMR: False
  end
  alt [has read current chunk]
    SMR -> LL: lock next chunk (reading)
    note over SC: Blocks until next\nchunk is written
    LL --> SMR
    SMR -> LA: Release previous leaving
    SMR -> LA: Change active
    LA --> SMR
    SMR -> RCV: reset read flag
    RCV --> SMR
    SMR -> CB: get chunk size
    CB --> SMR: c_size
    SMR -> SMR: c_size > 0
  end
  alt [Yet to read current and no finished flag]
    SMR -> SMR: True
  end
  alt [finished]
    note over SMR: This is done before\nactually returning
    SMR -> RCV: Set finished flag
    RCV --> SMR
    SMR -> LL: Release lock
    LL --> SMR
  end
end

group buff size
  SMR -> SMR
  SMR -> RCV: get buff_size from coord
  RCV --> SMR: buff_size
  SMR <-- SMR
end

group receive
  SMR -> SMR
  note over SMR: This is called after ready so I am already on the correct\nchunk and it has data to read
  alt [read_flag_set or finished flag set]
    SMR -> SMR: Fail
  end
  SMR -> CB: Read data in current chunk
  CB --> SMR: vector
  SMR -> RCV: set read flag
  RCV --> SMR
  SMR -> LL: lock leaving
  LL --> SMR
  SMR -> LA: release active
  LA --> SMR
  SMR <-- SMR: vector
end

group destructor
  SMR -> SMR: Destroy
  alt [not finished]
    alt [read_flag set]
      SMR -> LL: unlock
      LL --> SMR
    end
    alt [read_flag false]
      SMR -> LA: unlock
      LA --> SMR
    end
    SMR -> LA: Notify left
    SMR -> CB: Unmap memory
    CB --> SMR
    SMR -> SC: Close files
    SC --> SMR
  end
end

@enduml
```
